subcodes.first_line: It is humbly submitted that in these days, the honoured Haji-'Ali-i-Qarabaghi, who was steadfast and a true believer in God, hath ascended [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض میشود در این ایام جناب حاجی علی قره باغی که موقن و مومن بالله بود برفیق
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @eulogies; reminiscences
